title: fees.rs AmountOverflow for note-sum overflow misuses variant fields; misleading message
description: fees.rs:146-149: When the running note sum overflows inside select_notes(), the code returns CoinSelectError::AmountOverflow { target: sum, fee: note.value_zatoshi } where 'target' is the running sum and 'fee' is a note value, not the fee. Display says 'target + fee overflows u64' — misleading. Either add a separate NoteValueOverflow variant or only trigger AmountOverflow for the real target+fee overflow at line 123.
